subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, Beloved of my heart and Ultimate Goal of my desire and End of my hopes! Thou hearest the yearning sighs of them that long for Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی و محبوب سری و غایه املی و منتهی رجائی تسمع حنین المشتاقین و
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @condition of search, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
